name: Heap
description: Heap is a digital insights platform that automatically captures every user interaction. Analyze user behavior, build funnels, and identify friction points without manual event instrumentation.

capabilities.name: track_event
capabilities.description: Send a custom track event for a specific user.

capabilities.name: add_user_properties
capabilities.description: Set or update properties on a user profile.

capabilities.name: bulk_track
capabilities.description: Send multiple events in a single batch request.

capabilities.name: query_users
capabilities.description: Query user data using the Heap Connect API.

capabilities.name: add_account_properties
capabilities.description: Set properties on an account for B2B analytics.
